name: BRAIN SCINTIGRAPHY
definition: old-style agents require a disruption of blood-brain barrier to diffuse into brain lipophilic agents rapidly crossing blood-brain barrier with accumulation in brain ethyl cysteinate dimer = bicisate N-isopropyl-p[123I]iodoamphetamine iodine = 123I-IMP
discriminating_features: activity in an area of initial deficit on reimaging (after 4 hours) implies improved
focal hypoperfusion during interictal injection of tracer (less sensitive)
focal hyperperfusion during ictal injection of tracer (better detection)

general: activity in an area of initial deficit on reimaging (after 4 hours) implies improved
focal hypoperfusion during interictal injection of tracer (less sensitive)
focal hyperperfusion during ictal injection of tracer (better detection)
